belier.intro: The waxing Moon blazes at 26° Leo, flooding your fellow fire sign with theatrical light and raw appetite. She forms a natural trine across the fire triangle, fanning the Aries flame higher just as the Sun settles into steady Taurus - a friction between your instinct to leap and the day's quieter gravitational pull toward consolidation. With no planet retrograde, the current runs clean and forward: what you start today moves without hidden drag.
belier.love: Leo's Moon craves admiration, and that desire lands squarely in your chest today - you want to be seen, fully and without apology. Let that hunger guide you toward honesty rather than performance; the partner or prospect who meets your candor with their own is worth ten who simply applaud. If you are unattached, a moment of genuine self-expression in public could open an unexpected door.
belier.work: The Sun in Taurus steadies your otherwise impatient hand, lending your Aries fire the patience to actually finish what it ignites. This is a rare and useful alliance - use it to push a project past its rough draft into something polished and real. Colleagues respond well to your confidence today, but pair it with substance and the impression you leave will last well beyond the afternoon.
belier.energy: Your physical vitality runs high under a nearly full-quarter Moon in Leo, the kind of energy that wants an audience or at least open space. Channel it deliberately - a hard run, a demanding practice, creative work that makes you sweat - or it circles back as restlessness by nightfall.
belier.intuition: Heraclitus wrote that 'the soul has its own logos which increases itself' - today yours speaks loudly, especially through the body's sudden alerts and gut-level refusals. Trust what tightens in your chest before your mind can explain it; the fire in you recognizes truth faster than language does.
belier.mantra: I act with courage and finish with care.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Sun rests at 5° of your own sign today, Taurus, bathing you in a quiet, steady light that feels like home. The waxing Moon in Leo at 26°51' pulls at your creative instincts from across the sky, asking you to add a little warmth and boldness to your usual groundedness. With no retrogrades in the sky, the path ahead is unusually clear - what you plant now has every reason to grow.
taureau.love: Leo's Moon lights a stage, and somewhere in your relationships today, someone wants to feel seen and applauded - it may be you. Let your natural Venusian tenderness meet a dash of Leo's dramatic generosity: say the kind thing out loud, don't just feel it. A relationship that has felt stuck may loosen its roots today if you offer a little warmth you've been holding back.
taureau.work: The Sun in your sign gives you a rare kind of quiet authority today - people sense your solidity without you having to prove anything. Use this to anchor a project that has been drifting, or to make a decision you've been circling. The first-quarter Moon is a cosmic call to act, not to wait: the blueprint is ready, now pick up the tools.
taureau.energy: Your body is your compass today, and it is pointing toward moderate, satisfying exertion - a long walk, work done with your hands, something tactile and real. Venus rules you, so beauty nourishes you as much as food does; let some of today's energy go toward making your environment a little more pleasing.
taureau.intuition: Taurus is not always credited with intuition, but your instincts live in your senses - trust what feels wrong in your body before your mind can name it. Hermes Trismegistus wrote that the material world is a mirror of the invisible one; today, what your hands touch and your nose smells carries a message worth listening to.
taureau.mantra: I am rooted, I am radiant, I bloom in my own time.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The waxing moon blazes at 26 degrees Leo, and you feel it like a spotlight turned on inside your chest - something wants to be seen today, not just thought about. With the Sun settled in steady Taurus and not a single planet in retrograde, the skies offer you a rare gift: clear signal, no static. For a mind like yours, Gemini, that kind of unobstructed air is almost intoxicating.
gemeaux.love: Leo's fire moon pulls your natural wit toward genuine warmth - the joke lands, then something truer follows it. If you are with someone, let the performance drop for a moment and say the real thing; they are ready to hear it. If you are searching, the person worth finding today is drawn by your sincerity, not your cleverness.
gemeaux.work: No retrogrades means your words travel straight from mouth to destination - a rare day to pitch, publish, or finally send that message you have been drafting in your head for weeks. The Taurus Sun grounds your mercurial ideas into something others can actually hold and use. Pick one project from the swirling many and give it your full, undivided attention for a few hours.
gemeaux.energy: The waxing moon at 68 percent illumination is building pressure in your system like a sail filling with wind - you have momentum, use it before evening when the mind tends to scatter. Stay hydrated and give your hands something tactile to do; Gemini energy runs best when the body is anchored.
gemeaux.intuition: Hermes Trismegistus wrote that the mind is a mirror - today yours is polished clean. Trust the first impression you receive about a person or situation before analysis rewrites it into something more comfortable.
gemeaux.mantra: I speak my truth clearly and the right doors open.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon, your ruling planet, burns bright in Leo at 26°51', swelling toward fullness in its first quarter phase - a direct line of light between your celestial mother and the sign of bold self-expression. This is an unusual invitation for you, dear Cancer: the shell opens, and the pearl inside is asked to shine in full daylight. The Sun anchors itself in Taurus, your fellow creature of the earth and feeling, offering you a rare stability beneath your tides.
cancer.love: With the Leo Moon illuminating your emotional world, quiet devotion may feel insufficient today - you want to be seen, celebrated, held with intention. If you love someone, say it louder than you normally would; the universe is not rewarding subtlety right now. Single or partnered, let yourself receive attention without immediately deflecting it back to the other person.
cancer.work: The Taurus Sun grounds your natural intuition in practical soil, making this an excellent day to move a creative project from dream to draft. You tend to nurture others' visions before your own - today, reverse that order for a few hours. With no planets retrograde, the path forward is clear; take one concrete step you have been postponing.
cancer.energy: The first quarter Moon carries a building momentum, and your body likely feels this as a low hum of readiness rather than explosive drive. Respect that rhythm - steady movement, a walk, water nearby - these will carry you further than forcing a sprint.
cancer.intuition: As Hermes Trismegistus wrote, 'As above, so below' - and today your inner sea reflects the Leo sky with unusual clarity. A feeling that arrives between waking and full alertness this morning deserves to be written down, not dismissed.
cancer.mantra: I shine from within, and the world welcomes my light.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Moon sits directly in your sign today, Leo, at 26 degrees and blazing toward fullness at 68 percent illumination - this is your sky, your stage. No planet moves backward; the cosmos rolls forward with clean, unobstructed momentum. With the Sun anchored in Taurus forming a grounding square to your lunar throne, the fire in you meets earth, and that friction is not an obstacle but a forge.
lion.love: You radiate something undeniable today, and those around you feel it before you even speak. In love, resist the urge to perform - the most magnetic thing you can offer is genuine presence, not spectacle. A quiet moment of real attention given to someone you care about will land deeper than any grand gesture.
lion.work: The Moon in your sign sharpens your instinct for leadership, but the Taurus Sun asks you to build, not just inspire. An idea you have been circling deserves a concrete first step today - write it down, map it out, commit resources to it. Your vision is not the problem; your follow-through is the gift waiting to be given.
lion.energy: Your vitality runs high and steady, like a controlled flame rather than a flare. Use this physical confidence for something demanding - a long walk, a creative sprint, anything that honors the body's readiness rather than letting it idle.
lion.intuition: Hermes Trismegistus wrote that what is above is like what is below - and today your inner sun and the outer Sun are in rare conversation. When a feeling rises without explanation, take note; it carries signal, not noise.
lion.mantra: I lead with presence, I build with purpose.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The waxing Moon blazing through Leo at nearly 27 degrees presses against your instinct for quiet precision, Virgo - it asks you to step into a larger room than you usually allow yourself. With no planets retrograde and the Sun settled into steady Taurus, your fellow earth sign, there is a rare solidity underfoot. Heraclitus said the hidden harmony is stronger than the visible one, and today that harmony is yours to claim.
vierge.love: The Leo Moon illuminates what you have been keeping in the shadows of your heart - a desire to be seen, not just useful. Let someone admire you today without immediately deflecting the attention back to them. In long-term bonds, a small gesture of warmth offered without calculation can shift the entire atmosphere.
vierge.work: Taurus Sun feeds your Mercurian mind with patience and follow-through, a combination that turns careful plans into real results. Today is ideal for finishing what others have left half-done - your eye for detail is sharper than usual, and your stamina matches it. Trust the method you have already built; it is sounder than you give it credit for.
vierge.energy: The first-quarter Moon at 68% illumination carries a building momentum that suits your body well - not explosive, but steady and purposeful. Avoid the trap of over-scheduling; one deep task completed is worth three half-finished ones.
vierge.intuition: Mercury, your ruling planet, moves freely today with nothing in retrograde to blur the signal - what arrives quietly in your mind this morning deserves to be written down. Hermes Trismegistus wrote that the inner and outer worlds mirror each other; the pattern you notice in a small detail today may be the key to something much larger.
vierge.mantra: I receive what I have earned with open hands.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The waxing moon blazes at 26 degrees Leo today, flooding the sky with theatrical light just as the Sun settles into the quiet, sensory world of Taurus. For you, Libra, this creates a delicious tension between spectacle and substance - the Leo moon pulls your social instincts wide open while Taurus's solar gravity asks what truly endures beneath all the shine. With no planets in retrograde, the current flows forward without obstruction, a rare clarity that rewards decisive action.
balance.love: The Leo moon lights your house of companionship and play, making this a day when love wants to be seen, celebrated, expressed out loud. If you have been keeping a feeling quiet, the sky is gently pushing it toward the surface - not with drama, but with warmth. Single or partnered, let yourself be a little bolder than usual; Venus, your ruler, approves of this kind of honest brightness.
balance.work: Taurus's solar energy stabilizes your professional instincts today, giving your natural Libran diplomacy a grounded, practical edge that colleagues will notice and respect. This is an excellent day to finalize agreements, present creative work, or have a conversation you have been circling for days. The forward motion of every planet means your words land cleanly - say what you mean without wrapping it in too many layers.
balance.energy: The first-quarter moon at 68% illumination sits in that charged middle space between beginning and fullness, and your body likely mirrors that - alive, building, slightly restless. Channel this vitality into something physical and pleasurable, a long walk, dancing, anything that lets the Leo moon's exuberance move through your limbs rather than accumulate as tension.
balance.intuition: Your air-sign mind tends to weigh every sign against its opposite, but today your inner compass is unusually steady. Trust the first reading, the quiet knowing that arrives before the analysis begins - as Heraclitus wrote, 'The soul has its own logos which increases itself.' Let that inner logos speak before the scales start swinging.
balance.mantra: I shine clearly and choose what truly lasts.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The waxing Moon blazes at 26° Leo, lighting up the part of your chart that governs the deepest contracts you make with others - shared resources, hidden bonds, the things you hold in joint custody with the world. At 68% illumination, she is nearly full but not yet, which mirrors a truth Heraclitus knew well: 'You cannot step into the same river twice.' Something is building, Scorpio, not yet revealed. With the Sun settled in Taurus and no planet retrograde, the sky offers unusual clarity - a rare invitation to look steadily at what you have been circling without landing.
scorpion.love: Leo's fire in the house of intimacy stirs your need to be truly seen, not just wanted. If you are in a relationship, a conversation that begins as ordinary may crack open into something unexpectedly honest - let it. If you are unattached, notice who meets your eyes without flinching; that small courage tells you more than any word.
scorpion.work: The Taurus Sun anchors your opposite axis, asking you to weigh what is materially real against what is strategically possible. This is a good day to negotiate, to sign, to finalize arrangements that have been hovering. Your natural ability to read beneath the surface gives you an edge in any discussion involving value, money, or shared ownership.
scorpion.energy: The Leo Moon tends to push vitality upward and outward, which can feel unfamiliar for a sign that usually gathers strength inward. Let yourself be a little louder, a little warmer today - the fire will not burn you. Rest only if your body asks; otherwise, this current carries you.
scorpion.intuition: Hermes Trismegistus wrote, 'As above, so below; as within, so without.' With no planetary interference distorting the sky, your inner signal runs clean right now. Trust the image that surfaces before logic has time to argue with it.
scorpion.mantra: I hold steady while the deepest truth rises to meet me.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The waxing Moon blazes at 26 degrees Leo, a fellow fire sign, and she ignites your natural hunger for life with a dramatic, generous flame. With no planets retrograde, the sky runs clean and forward - your arrows fly straight today, unobstructed. The Sun settling into earthy Taurus at 5 degrees asks you to aim high but plant your feet before you release the bow.
sagittaire.love: Leo's Moon stirs your desire to be seen and celebrated, and you may find yourself performing for someone you care about - which is fine, as long as you also listen. A partner or potential connection responds warmly to your enthusiasm today, but genuine presence beats a grand gesture. Let the conversation breathe; what you hear in the silence may matter more than what you say.
sagittaire.work: The Taurus Sun slows your usual galloping pace just enough to be useful - use this friction to finish something rather than begin three new things. Your vision is wide and your confidence is real, but a project gains more ground today through persistence than through inspiration alone. One completed task carries more weight than five brilliant ideas left half-formed.
sagittaire.energy: The fire trine between the Leo Moon and your Sagittarian nature keeps your physical vitality high and your restlessness even higher - channel it into movement, not agitation. A long walk, a run, or even an impromptu dance answers the body's need without burning out the spirit.
sagittaire.intuition: Heraclitus said the soul is a dry light, and today yours burns especially clear. Trust the flash of knowing that arrives before your reasoning catches up - it is not recklessness, it is the archer's instinct.
sagittaire.mantra: I aim with clarity and land with purpose.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The waxing Moon burns bright in Leo at nearly 27 degrees, flooding the sky with theatrical light that lands square against your Capricorn steadiness. You are earth, you are structure, you are Saturn's patient apprentice - and yet today something in you wants to be seen, not just respected. With the Sun settled in Taurus, a fellow earth sign, this is not chaos calling but rather a quiet dare: let yourself take up a little more room.
capricorne.love: That Leo Moon lights up your intimacy sector like a stage lamp, and hiding your feelings today will cost more than showing them. If you are in a relationship, one honest moment of warmth will do more than a week of reliable gestures. If you are single, the person drawn to your quiet confidence now wants a glimpse of the fire underneath it.
capricorne.work: The Taurus Sun steadies your ambitions and asks you to build, not just plan. One concrete step forward on a project you have been circling is worth ten strategy sessions. With no planets retrograde, the path is unusually clear - trust the clarity and commit your hand to the work.
capricorne.energy: Your body today prefers momentum over stillness - a walk, a task completed with your hands, something that reminds your muscles they belong to you. Resist the Capricorn habit of ignoring fatigue as weakness; rest is also a form of discipline.
capricorne.intuition: Hermes Trismegistus wrote that what is above mirrors what is below - and today your gut speaks the same language as the stars. A hunch that surfaces around midday deserves a second look rather than your usual rational audit.
capricorne.mantra: I build with patience and shine without apology.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The waxing Moon at nearly 69% illumination burns bright in Leo, your opposite sign, pulling your attention toward the tension between self-expression and collective belonging - the very axis that defines you, Aquarius. With no planets retrograde, the sky moves forward without hesitation, and the Sun's steady footing in Taurus grounds what might otherwise feel like restless electric current running through your Uranian wires. Today asks you to hold both poles: the singular voice and the shared dream.
verseau.love: The Leo Moon lights up your seventh house of partnership like a stage lamp, and someone close to you may need more warmth and visible appreciation than your cool air nature tends to offer freely. Try meeting that need not as a performance but as a genuine experiment - Aquarius learns love by doing it differently. If you are unattached, a spontaneous encounter carries real charge today, the kind that surprises even you.
verseau.work: The Taurus Sun anchors your fourth house, whispering that the most productive work today happens close to your foundation - reviewing a project's roots, renegotiating its structure, or simply finishing what was started weeks ago. No retrograde interference means your communications land cleanly, so send that proposal or pitch that has been sitting in draft. Others are listening with open ears.
verseau.energy: Your nervous system runs hot under this Leo Moon opposition, and you may feel simultaneously wired and oddly drained by midday - as Heraclitus said, the bow is alive precisely because of the tension between its two ends. Protect that tension rather than collapse it: short bursts of movement serve you better than long sustained effort today.
verseau.intuition: The absence of retrograde friction creates an unusually clear channel between your rational mind and the deeper signal beneath it - trust the first reading, not the third revision. Hermes Trismegistus called this direct knowing, and your sign, ruled by sudden Uranus, was built for precisely these flashes of unmediated clarity.
verseau.mantra: I hold my vision and stay open to the world.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The waxing moon burns at 26 degrees Leo, bright and theatrical, pulling your naturally fluid Piscean waters toward an unusual shore: visibility. With no planets in retrograde and the Taurus sun anchoring the day in solid earth, there is a rare invitation to stop drifting and plant something real. Neptune, your ruling planet, whispers its usual poetry, but today the cosmos asks you to speak that poetry aloud.
poissons.love: The Leo moon illuminates what you usually keep submerged, and in matters of the heart that is not a threat but a gift. If you have been carrying a feeling in silence, today the light is strong enough and warm enough to hold it. Let yourself be seen, even imperfectly, by the one who matters.
poissons.work: The Taurus sun rewards patience and craft, two things Pisces can master when distraction is kept at bay. Focus on one tangible output today, something you can finish, something with edges. The first-quarter moon is a builder's moon, and your imagination paired with earth's discipline can produce something genuinely beautiful.
poissons.energy: Your vitality today is steadier than your usual tidal rhythm, thanks to the grounding influence of Taurus. Move through the day slowly and deliberately, like water finding the shape of a vessel, and you will not run dry.
poissons.intuition: Hermes Trismegistus wrote that 'the inner and the outer are one.' Today your intuition speaks not through dreams but through your body, a tightening in the chest, a sudden calm. Trust the quiet signal over the loud one.
poissons.mantra: I give my inner world a shape the world can hold.
poissons.author: Sibylle
